name: clothing-color-match-studio
description: Windows desktop POC for AI-assisted garment color calibration.
author: Clothing Color Match Studio Team

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.app.json && tsc -p tsconfig.node.json && vite build
scripts.desktop:build: tsc -p tsconfig.app.json && tsc -p tsconfig.node.json && vite build --mode desktop
scripts.desktop:pack: npm run desktop:build && npm run desktop:pack-backend && npm run desktop:check && electron-builder --dir
scripts.desktop:dist: npm run desktop:build && npm run desktop:pack-backend && npm run desktop:check && electron-builder --win portable
scripts.desktop:installer: npm run desktop:build && npm run desktop:pack-backend && npm run desktop:check && electron-builder --win nsis
